document_title_zh: 人工智能生成合成内容标识办法
document_title_en: Measures for the Labeling of AI-Generated Synthetic Content
control_objective: Explicit AIGC labels should exist only for human-confirmed explicit-label scenarios unless scoped Article 9 provider-delivery exception evidence applies

document_title_zh: 人工智能生成合成内容标识办法
document_title_en: Measures for the Labeling of AI-Generated Synthetic Content
control_objective: Label prominence and perceptibility require human review

document_title_zh: 人工智能生成合成内容标识办法
document_title_en: Measures for the Labeling of AI-Generated Synthetic Content
control_objective: Generated synthetic content metadata should include underlying machine-readable label fields

document_title_zh: GB 45438-2025 网络安全技术 人工智能生成合成内容标识方法
document_title_en: GB 45438-2025 Cybersecurity Technology: Labeling Method for AI-Generated Synthetic Content
control_objective: Synthetic-content files that support metadata should include selected technical metadata fields

document_title_zh: 中华人民共和国个人信息保护法
document_title_en: Personal Information Protection Law of the People's Republic of China
control_objective: Sensitive personal information in actor or digital human workflows should have separate consent evidence unless a reviewed exception applies

document_title_zh: 中华人民共和国个人信息保护法
document_title_en: Personal Information Protection Law of the People's Republic of China
control_objective: Face voice or biometric-like actor materials should be classified before processing

document_title_zh: 互联网信息服务深度合成管理规定
document_title_en: Provisions on the Administration of Deep Synthesis Internet Information Services
control_objective: Face or voice editing features should prompt users to notify edited individuals

document_title_zh: 互联网信息服务深度合成管理规定
document_title_en: Provisions on the Administration of Deep Synthesis Internet Information Services
control_objective: Derived organizational assurance for edited-person consent evidence and scope review

document_title_zh: 生成式人工智能服务管理暂行办法
document_title_en: Interim Measures for the Management of Generative AI Services
control_objective: Public-facing generative AI services with public opinion or social mobilization capacity should have reviewed filing applicability and registration metadata

document_title_zh: 生成式人工智能服务管理暂行办法
document_title_en: Interim Measures for the Management of Generative AI Services
control_objective: Article 4 content safety is treated as a principle and prohibited-content norm requiring human review

document_title_zh: 生成式人工智能服务管理暂行办法
document_title_en: Interim Measures for the Management of Generative AI Services
control_objective: Complaints should be linked to disclosed process feedback time limit and tracked handling result

document_title_zh: 互联网信息服务深度合成管理规定
document_title_en: Provisions on the Administration of Deep Synthesis Internet Information Services
control_objective: Deep synthesis content that may cause public confusion should carry a prominent label
